prevalence.population: Women of reproductive age in the EU

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Rotterdam criteria; exclusion of other endocrine causes; metabolic risk assessment included in routine care

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate with access to lifestyle support and reproductive endocrinology services

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Broad access to ultrasound and labs in many member states; metabolic screening common
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Lifestyle intervention, OCPs for symptoms, metformin for metabolic risk, fertility treatments when desired
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Access variability and long wait times for fertility services in some systems
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Structured reproductive endocrinology pathways and metabolic screening in many health systems
